title: Aglaomorpha sparsisora
taxonomy: Aglaomorpha sparsisora is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is classified as a vascular plant, belonging to the division Pteridophyta and the class Polypodiopsida. This classification places Aglaomorpha sparsisora within the phylum Tracheophyta and the kingdom Plantae. The species is further categorized into the order Polypodiales and the family Polypodiaceae. The combination of these classifications provides a comprehensive understanding of Aglaomorpha sparsisora's taxonomic position within the plant kingdom.
uses: Aglaomorpha sparsisora has been reported to have various medicinal uses in traditional medicine. Its extracts have been studied for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to contribute to its potential health benefits.
